This classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the clade of dicotyledons. Astracantha gevashensis is further categorized within the subfamily Faboideae, which is a large and diverse group of legumes. The genus Astracantha is part of the tribe Astragalus, a group of legumes that are often referred to as milkvetches or locoweed. Astracantha gevashensis is a specific species within this complex classification system.
